records.point_name: Foothills BC (AB/BC → Kingsgate → GTN → Malin → PG&E)

notices.headline: Meikle River D5 - Compressor Station Maintenance
notices.body: Potential impact to FT-R. Affects Foothills BC, Foothills SK. Affected areas: Segments 2, 3, 4, and partial 7 (Upstream of Berland); Alberta/BC and Alberta/Montana Borders; Empress/McNeill Borders; Segments 6, 10, 11, 13, 14, 15, 16, 23, 24, and partial 28; Segments 10, 11, and 14. Effective 2026-06-22 through 2026-06-26.
